originalTitle: SK Hynix’s stock sees double-digit pop in Nasdaq debut
summary: The South Korean memory-chip company’s new American depositary receipts began trading on Friday and logged gains of nearly 13%.
content: The South Korean memory-chip company’s new American depositary receipts began trading on Friday and logged gains of nearly 13%.
chineseTitle: SK海力士股价在纳斯达克首次亮相时出现两位数上涨
chineseSummary: 这家韩国存储芯片公司的新美国存托凭证于周五开始交易，涨幅接近 13%。
chineseContent: 这家韩国存储芯片公司的新美国存托凭证于周五开始交易，涨幅接近 13%。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
